text:
Product: The Inventory Not Tracked Snowboard
snowboard / aurora-outfitters-co
Tags: Accessory, Sport, Winter
Price: 949.95 USD
A dependable all-mountain board for riders who just want to get out and ride. Medium flex, a forgiving rocker profile, and a sintered base that holds speed on groomers and stays loose in soft snow. Available in a 156 cm length that suits most intermediate riders.
Variants:
- Standard: 949.95, in stock

Product: The Collection Snowboard: Hydrogen
snowboard / Hydrogen Vendor
Tags: Accessory, Sport, Winter
Price: 600.0 USD
The lightest board in our Collection series. A full poplar core with carbon stringers keeps the swing weight low, so quick trees and tight moguls feel effortless. Directional twin shape, medium-soft flex, best between 152 and 158 cm rider sizing.
Variants:
- Standard: 600.00, in stock (50 available)

Product: The Minimal Snowboard
aurora-outfitters-co
Price: 885.95 USD
Clean lines, no graphics, all business. The Minimal is a stiff directional charger built for carving hardpack at speed, with a camber-dominant profile and a full-length birch core. Suits confident intermediate to advanced riders.
Variants:
- Standard: 885.95, in stock (49 available)

Product: The Compare at Price Snowboard
snowboard / aurora-outfitters-co
Tags: Accessory, Sport, Winter
Price: 785.95 USD
Last season's flagship shape at a friendly price. Full camber, responsive mid-stiff flex, and a durable extruded base that shrugs off early-season rocks. An easy pick for riders who want performance without paying for this year's paint job.
Variants:
- Standard: 785.95, in stock (10 available)

Product: The Out of Stock Snowboard
snowboard / aurora-outfitters-co
Tags: Accessory, Sport, Winter
Price: 885.95 USD
Our most popular powder shape, with a tapered directional outline, setback stance, and generous nose rocker that floats without effort. Restocks sell through fast, so join the waitlist if it shows as unavailable.
Variants:
- Standard: 885.95, out of stock

Product: Selling Plans Ski Wax
accessories / aurora-outfitters-co
Tags: Accessory, Sport, Winter
Price range: 9.95 to 49.95 USD
All-temperature glide wax that works on skis and snowboards alike. Rub on, cork in, ride. One bar covers roughly ten full tune-ups, and the sample size is a great way to try it before committing to the full bar.
Variants:
- Selling Plans Ski Wax: 24.95, in stock (9 available)
- Special Selling Plans Ski Wax: 49.95, in stock (10 available)
- Sample Selling Plans Ski Wax: 9.95, in stock (10 available)

Product: The Complete Snowboard
snowboard / Snowboard Vendor
Tags: Premium, Snow, Snowboard, Sport, Winter
Price: 699.95 USD
This PREMIUM snowboard is so SUPERDUPER awesome!
Variants:
- Ice: 699.95, in stock (10 available)

- Powder: 699.95, in stock (10 available)

Product: The Videographer Snowboard
snowboard / aurora-outfitters-co
Price: 885.95 USD
Built for filmers and park laps. A true twin with a soft, buttery flex, pressable tips, and a base tuned for consistent speed into features. Rides switch exactly like it rides regular.
Variants:
- Standard: 885.95, in stock (50 available)

Product: The Hidden Snowboard
snowboard / Snowboard Vendor
Tags: Premium, Snow, Snowboard, Sport, Winter
Price: 749.95 USD
A limited shop-exclusive deck we keep off the main wall. Hand-numbered topsheet, mid flex, and a versatile directional twin shape that handles the whole mountain. Ask us directly about current availability.
Variants:
- Standard: 749.95, in stock (50 available)

Product: The Multi-location Snowboard
snowboard / aurora-outfitters-co
Tags: Premium, Snow, Snowboard, Sport, Winter
Price: 729.95 USD
A do-everything daily driver stocked across all our warehouses for fast delivery. Medium flex, hybrid camber, and a wear-resistant extruded base make it a low-maintenance board for riders who log a lot of days.
Variants:
- Standard: 729.95, in stock (99 available)

Product: The 3p Fulfilled Snowboard
snowboard / aurora-outfitters-co
Tags: Accessory, Sport, Winter
Price: 2629.95 USD
Shipped directly from our fulfillment partner, usually within one business day. The board itself is a stable all-mountain cruiser with a gentle rocker profile that keeps turn initiation easy for progressing riders.
Variants:
- Standard: 2629.95, in stock (20 available)

Product: The Multi-managed Snowboard
snowboard / Multi-managed Vendor
Tags: Premium, Snow, Snowboard, Sport, Winter
Price: 629.95 USD
A versatile mid-wide shape for riders with larger boots who are tired of toe drag. Medium-stiff flex, hybrid camber, and a 26.0 cm waist width in the 158 cm size.
Variants:
- Standard: 629.95, in stock (100 available)

Product: The Collection Snowboard: Oxygen
snowboard / Hydrogen Vendor
Tags: Accessory, Sport, Winter
Price: 1025.0 USD
The freeride entry in our Collection series. A stiffer directional shape with a floaty nose, carbon-backed tail, and a fast sintered base for riders who point it when the snow gets deep.
Variants:
- Standard: 1025.00, in stock (50 available)

Product: The Collection Snowboard: Liquid
snowboard / Hydrogen Vendor
Tags: Accessory, Sport, Winter
Price: 749.95 USD
The surf-inspired member of the Collection series. Loose, playful, and happiest in slush and spring laps, with a wide nose and a swallow-influenced tail that skims over soft snow.
Variants:
- Standard: 749.95, in stock (49 available)

Product: Summit Ridge 2-Person Tent
Camping / Aurora Outfitters
Tags: backpacking, camping, tent
Price: 289.99 USD
A freestanding three-season tent that pitches in under ten minutes. The 20D ripstop fly carries a 3000 mm waterproof coating with fully taped seams, and two doors with matching vestibules mean nobody climbs over anybody at 2 am. Packed weight is 2.1 kg with aluminum poles, split-packable between two hikers.
Variants:
- Forest Green: 289.99, in stock (11 available)
- Burnt Orange: 289.99, in stock (8 available)

Product: Cascade 40L Hiking Backpack
Packs / Aurora Outfitters
Tags: backpack, daypack, hiking
Price: 149.95 USD
Our most versatile pack: big enough for an overnight, trim enough for a long day hike. A ventilated back panel keeps airflow moving, the hip belt carries zippered pockets for snacks and a phone, and a rain cover lives in a dedicated pocket in the lid. Hydration compatible, 1.4 kg.
Variants:
- S/M: 149.95, in stock (14 available)
- M/L: 149.95, in stock (10 available)

Product: Stormline Rain Jacket
Apparel / Aurora Outfitters
Tags: jacket, rain, shell, waterproof
Price: 179.99 USD
A 2.5-layer waterproof breathable shell rated 10,000 mm / 10,000 g, with fully taped seams and an adjustable storm hood. Pit zips dump heat on the climb, and the whole jacket packs into its own chest pocket. Machine wash cold and tumble low to revive the DWR.
Variants:
- S: 179.99, in stock (6 available)
- M: 179.99, in stock (13 available)
- L: 179.99, in stock (12 available)
- XL: 179.99, in stock (5 available)

Product: Trailblazer Merino Base Layer
Apparel / Aurora Outfitters
Tags: base layer, merino
Price: 84.99 USD
A 180 gsm merino crew that regulates temperature on the move and resists odor for days of wear. Flatlock seams sit flush under pack straps. Machine wash cold, lay flat to dry, and it will outlast a drawer full of synthetics.
Variants:
- M: 84.99, in stock (8 available)
- L: 84.99, in stock (9 available)

Product: Glacier Point Down Parka
Apparel / Aurora Outfitters
Tags: down, insulated, parka, winter
Price: 329.99 USD
Serious warmth for deep winter: 700-fill responsibly sourced down inside a DWR-treated shell, with an insulated hood, interior stash pockets, and a two-way front zip. Comfortable standing around camp to about -15 C when layered.
Variants:
- M: 329.99, in stock (7 available)
- L: 329.99, in stock (6 available)
- XL: 329.99, in stock (4 available)

Product: Ridgeline Trekking Poles
Gear / Aurora Outfitters
Tags: hiking, poles, trekking
Price: 89.95 USD
Telescoping aluminum poles with reliable flick locks, natural cork grips, and extended foam chokes for steep sidehills. Carbide tips grip rock and ice, rubber feet are included for pavement. 245 g per pole, sold as a pair.
Variants:
- Standard: 89.95, in stock (19 available)

Product: Ember 750 Sleeping Bag
Camping / Aurora Outfitters
Tags: backpacking, down, sleeping bag
Price: 249.99 USD
A 750-fill down mummy bag with a 15 F comfort limit at just 860 g. A full-length draft tube and snag-free zipper guard keep the warmth in, and it ships with both a compression sack for the trail and a loose storage sack for the closet.
Variants:
- Regular: 249.99, in stock (7 available)
- Long: 249.99, in stock (6 available)

Product: Basecamp Titanium Cook Set
Camping / Aurora Outfitters
Tags: backpacking, cookware, titanium
Price: 119.99 USD
A 750 ml pot and 400 ml pan in pure titanium, 265 g for the set. The pot nests a 110 g fuel canister and a small stove, the lids double as plates, and the folding handles lock solid. Boils half a liter in under four minutes on a standard canister stove.
Variants:
- Standard: 119.99, in stock (10 available)

Product: Northwind Fleece Pullover
Apparel / Aurora Outfitters
Tags: fleece, midlayer
Price: 94.99 USD
A 200-weight fleece made from recycled polyester with a deep quarter zip and a zippered chest pocket. Anti-pill finish keeps it looking new through seasons of wear, on trail or off.
Variants:
- S: 94.99, in stock (8 available)
- M: 94.99, in stock (11 available)
- L: 94.99, in stock (10 available)

Product: Sierra Sun Hoody
Apparel / Aurora Outfitters
Tags: hiking, hoody, sun protection
Price: 69.95 USD
UPF 50+ sun protection in a featherweight knit that dries almost as fast as you sweat. A fitted three-panel hood layers under helmets, and thumb loops keep the sleeves anchored over the backs of your hands on long exposed miles.
Variants:
- M: 69.95, in stock (12 available)
- L: 69.95, in stock (9 available)

Product: Wander Insulated Bottle 32oz
Accessories / Aurora Outfitters
Tags: bottle, hydration, insulated
Price: 39.95 USD
Double-wall vacuum insulation keeps drinks cold for 24 hours or hot for 12. The powder-coated finish stays grippy with gloves on, and the base fits standard car cup holders. Hand wash the lid, everything else is dishwasher safe.
Variants:
- Slate: 39.95, in stock (24 available)
- Moss: 39.95, in stock (16 available)

Product: Peakfinder Headlamp 600
Gear / Aurora Outfitters
Tags: headlamp, lighting
Price: 59.99 USD
600 lumens on max, USB-C rechargeable, and IPX7 waterproof, so a storm or a dunk will not end your night. A dedicated red mode preserves night vision around camp. 68 g including the washable strap.
Variants:
- Standard: 59.99, in stock (15 available)

Product: Alpine Crossing Hiking Boots
Footwear / Aurora Outfitters
Tags: boots, hiking, waterproof
Price: 219.99 USD
Waterproof nubuck leather uppers over a Vibram outsole that bites on wet rock and loose scree. A gusseted tongue keeps grit out, and the midsole splits the difference between trail feel and all-day support. True to size with room for a midweight sock.
Variants:
- 9: 219.99, in stock (6 available)
- 10: 219.99, in stock (7 available)
- 11: 219.99, in stock (5 available)

Product: Drift Camp Chair
Camping / Aurora Outfitters
Tags: camp furniture, chair
Price: 74.99 USD
A packable chair that weighs 900 g and sets up in about a minute from a bag the size of a water bottle. The aluminum frame is rated to 120 kg, and the ripstop seat sheds sparks and spills alike.
Variants:
- Standard: 74.99, in stock (13 available)

Product: Meridian Ski Goggles
Snow / Aurora Outfitters
Tags: goggles, ski, snowboard
Price: 129.99 USD
A cylindrical dual lens with anti-fog coating and full UV protection, sized to fit over most prescription glasses. Ships with a bonus low-light lens for storm days and a microfiber sleeve that doubles as a lens cloth.
Variants:
- Standard: 129.99, in stock (9 available)
